The '''Harrier Infiltration Team''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] unit. It was composed of [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]], [[Deke Holman]], and [[Arecelis Acosta]]. All three members were stationed aboard the ''[[Prodigal]]''. During a mission to destroy an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] communications bunker on [[Nysza III]], Arecelis Acosta was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark Jedi]] [[Vialco]], though the other two members survived after completing their objective.<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />

{{Military-stub}}
